antipattern.symptom: Sponsor flagged manage_closely is actually monitor; mis-spent attention.
antipattern.root-cause: No evidence citation forced; classification by gut.
antipattern.fix: Validator requires evidence per quadrant entry.

antipattern.symptom: Manage_closely entries last engaged 3 weeks ago; sponsor surprised at status.
antipattern.fix: engagement-due.py runs weekly; overdue blocks status.

antipattern.symptom: Every entry shows current=supportive, desired=supportive; no engagement actions.
antipattern.root-cause: Author copies values to avoid scrutiny.
antipattern.fix: Reviewer challenges entries where current==desired across the board.

antipattern.symptom: Programme blocked by procurement; procurement not in register.
antipattern.fix: Run interview pass with sponsor + delivery; cross-check org chart.
